block_00: What Time Frame Is Best for Trading Forex?
block_01: It’s no secret that the type of time frame traders use can influence their interpretation of the market. Therefore, it is essential to use a time frame that shows relevant data and reduces noise that can lead to false signals.
block_02: So, what time frame should you trade? It depends on your style. We’ve compared the pros and cons of different intervals so you can find the one that’s right for you.
